stories.headline: Hong Kong Weathers War Shocks With Fastest Growth Since 2021
stories.summary: Hong Kong’s economy expanded at its fastest pace in almost five years despite a global energy crisis unleashed by the war in Iran, thanks to an insatiable global demand for artificial intelligence along with an uptick in both consumption and investment.

stories.headline: Ratcliffe’s Ineos Markets New Bond After Boost From Iran War

stories.headline: 'We can and we will strike': Iran threatens European military bases amid Hormuz escalation

stories.headline: France Says EU Will Retaliate If US Threatens Its Industries
stories.summary: The European Union has tools that it can turn to if Donald Trump makes excessive threats to strategic industries such as steel, French Trade Minister Nicolas Forissier said.

Now, crypto platforms are offering trades tied to the most valuable private AI companies on earth — ones ordinary investors have almost no other way to access.

stories.headline: Japan Has Two More Windows for Yen Intervention by IMF Rules

stories.headline: Drowning in Debt, Eight Million Firms Miss Payments in Brazil
